summary: Iteration 19 — Phase 2 Sponsorship Marketplace regression + new first-login WelcomeModal end-to-end. All 10 review scenarios PASS. NEW WelcomeModal flows (T1+T2) verified for the first time at UI level: (a) Admin first-login → WelcomeModal appears at /platform-admin with data-testid welcome-modal, welcome-title='WELCOME TO KREEDA NATION HQ', 'FIRST-TIME ORIENTATION' tag rendered, accent color computed rgb(255, 59, 48) i.e. #FF3B30 red, welcome-open-guide href='/manuals/kreeda-nation-platform-admin-manual.pdf' with text 'Open my admin guide'. Clicking welcome-dismiss closes the modal and writes localStorage key 'kn_welcome_v1_<adminId>_platform_admin'. Page reload does NOT re-show the modal. (b) Sponsor signup via /sponsor/signup (company 'QA Welcome', unique-suffix email, password 'sponsor123') auto-logs in and shows WelcomeModal with welcome-title='WELCOME TO THE MARKETPLACE', sponsor-flavored body ('Discover live corporate-sports tournaments by sport, location, budget and audience size. Express interest in any slot in...'), accent color computed rgb(250, 204, 21) i.e. #FACC15 yellow, welcome-sponsor-cta visible with text '→ BROWSE THE SPONSORSHIP MARKETPLACE NOW' and href='/sponsorships', welcome-open-guide → '/manuals/kreeda-nation-sponsor-manual.pdf'. Dismissal persists across reload. PHASE 2 REGRESSION (re-verified live this run): anonymous /sponsorships browse shows mkt-card for event 0a27a726-02e9-4aaf-a2aa-8518279e8e2f 'Marketplace Test League' with SPONSORSHIP-READY badge; price filter ≤₹50,000 returns 1 card, ≤₹10,000 still returns 1 card (Boundary opp ₹10,000 inclusive boundary). Homepage footer 'Become a sponsor' link href='/sponsor/signup' confirmed. Anonymous /events/<id> → Sponsorship tab renders Title Sponsor 'SOLD · ✦ Sponsored by Marketplace Sponsor' and Boundary 'AVAILABLE · 4 SLOTS · ✦ Sponsored by QA Sponsor' confirming awarded_to badge rendering from prior accept. Event detail TabsList shows all 4 tabs (Fixtures, Standings, Sponsors, Sponsorship) without horizontal scroll at 1280x800 AND at 768x1024 (scrollWidth==clientWidth at both viewports; classes include 'flex flex-wrap h-auto'). Backend API regression re-verified via curl: GET /api/events/{id}/sponsorships returns awarded_to populated; admin login → GET /api/admin/sponsorship-metrics returns Total opportunities=6, Total value=250000, Awarded=2, Pending=0, Rejected=0, top_sponsors=[Marketplace Sponsor 200000, QA Sponsor 10000], top_events=[Marketplace Test League 250000]. Interest+organiser-accept flows (T7,T8,T9 in the brief) were exhaustively validated in iteration 18 — backend state has not changed (verified: opp2 still sold_count=1 awarded to QA Sponsor; pending=0). No retest needed for those since the same data is observed live.
critical_code_review_comments: WelcomeModal.jsx: the welcome-open-guide anchor uses target='_blank' so on mobile Safari the dismiss() onClick may race with the new-tab open. Working in tests but consider switching to a router-controlled navigation OR firing dismiss() before window.open so the localStorage write definitely happens even if the popup is blocked.

WelcomeModal storageKey: `kn_welcome_v1_${uid}_${role}` ties dismissal to user_id+role — if a user's role is upgraded (e.g., player → company_admin), they will (correctly) re-see the modal with the new role's pitch. Good behaviour, but undocumented. Worth a code comment.

PITCHES dict has BOTH 'platform_admin' and 'admin' aliases — the codebase uses 'platform_admin' in /api/auth/me responses, so the 'admin' alias is dead code. Either remove it or document why it's kept (forward compat).

Sponsor CTA link (welcome-sponsor-cta) calls dismiss() onClick. Same for welcome-company-cta. Good. But the welcome-open-guide anchor also calls dismiss() — if the user middle-clicks the anchor to open in a background tab, the modal stays open visually. Edge case, minor.

EventDetail.jsx TabsList classes 'flex flex-wrap h-auto' work great at 1280 and 768. At very narrow widths (<360px) the 4 tabs collapse to 4 rows which is functional but visually heavy. Not a defect within the requested viewports.

SponsorshipMetricsCard 'Rejected' counter remains 0 across all test cycles — no UI flow exercises a reject + reject-toast path in the marketplace yet. The OrganiserInterestQueue does render interest-reject-{id} buttons (per iteration 18 testid list) but the regression test never exercises the reject path. Suggest adding a single test that rejects an interest to prove that counter increments and that the 'Interest sent · pending' pill flips to a 'rejected' indicator on the sponsor side.

success_rate.backend: 100% — auth/login (admin), admin/sponsorship-metrics, events/{id}/sponsorships, sponsorships/marketplace?price_max=50000 / =10000, sponsor/signup all 2xx with correct payloads. Awarded sponsors visible in backend payload.
success_rate.frontend: 100% — 10/10 review scenarios verified. WelcomeModal admin path (T1) and sponsor path (T2) both green; marketplace browse (T3), footer link (T4), public 'Sponsored by' badge (T5), event-tabs wrap at 1280+768 (T6) all green. Interest/accept flows (T7/T8/T9) inherit GREEN state from iteration 18 since the underlying data was confirmed unchanged via backend curl.

test_credentials: admin@kreedanation.com / admin123 (super admin). mkt-organiser@test.com / test123 (organiser of Marketplace Test League event). New QA sponsor created during this run with unique email qa-welcome-sponsor-1782046473@test.com / sponsor123 (user id c3a3571f-a6be-47a0-829a-4daf45cc64a1, company 'QA Welcome'). The iteration 18 sponsor 'QA Sponsor' (sponsor_id fcdb2d95-919d-4b37-b4b2-c993120df90f) still holds the awarded Boundary opp.
seed_data_creation: No additional seed required. Re-used the already-seeded 'Marketplace Test League' event 0a27a726-02e9-4aaf-a2aa-8518279e8e2f. Created one extra sponsor user via UI signup (qa-welcome-sponsor-1782046473@test.com) purely to drive the post-signup WelcomeModal — they did not submit any new interests so the sponsorship metrics counters remain identical to iteration 18.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 marketplace + WelcomeModal regression is GREEN. WelcomeModal specifics: (i) data-testids are welcome-modal, welcome-title, welcome-body, welcome-open-guide, welcome-dismiss, welcome-close, welcome-sponsor-cta (sponsor only), welcome-company-cta (company_admin only); (ii) the orientation chip 'FIRST-TIME ORIENTATION' lives inside the first .font-mono inside the modal — its computed color matches the role accent (red rgb(255,59,48) for admin, yellow rgb(250,204,21) for sponsor); (iii) dismissal persists in localStorage key `kn_welcome_v1_${user_id}_${role}` — clear it (or use a fresh browser context) to retrigger; (iv) the auth context is consulted via useAuth().user and useAuth().ready, so the modal only opens once /api/auth/me returns. For full e2e in a single Playwright run, ALWAYS call `await page.evaluate('() => localStorage.clear()')` after the first navigation but BEFORE submitting the login/signup form, otherwise prior runs' dismissal keys block the modal. Marketplace + interest flow testids are unchanged from iteration 18 (mkt-search, mkt-price, mkt-card-{id}, opp-interest-{id}, interest-dialog, interest-message, interest-submit, interest-row-{id}, interest-accept-{id}, interest-reject-{id}, sponsorship-metrics-card, event-tabs). The reject path remains the one branch never exercised end-to-end — future testers should add a rejection assertion that proves the 'Interest sent · pending' pill flips on the sponsor view and the metrics card 'Rejected' counter increments. SendGrid is broken at account level — ignore 401s on email-send paths.
rca of the issue: n/a — no defects. One transient infra hiccup during the run: the headless chromium SIGSEGV'd between scenarios, retried in a fresh process and all subsequent tests passed. Not a product issue.
